title: Intercontinental (ICE) Up 14% in 6 Months: More Upside Left?
text: A compelling portfolio, expansive risk management services, strategic buyouts, solid balance sheet and effective capital deployment continue to drive Intercontinental Exchange (ICE).

title: ICE Launches Multi-Faceted Global Brand and Advertising Campaign
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Intercontinental Exchange today unveiled its global brand campaign, called “Make the Connection.”

title: ICE Mortgage Technology Updates Website to Display Real-Time Mortgage Data
text: PLEASANTON, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ICE today announced its website home page has been updated with access to real-time mortgage data with Insights™ by ICE Mortgage Technology.

title: Worried About Market Volatility? Buy These 3 Stocks and Relax
text: These three companies make more money when markets are volatile.

title: Systemathics Ganymede Cloud Data Platform-as-a-service Integrates With ICE DataVault
text: PARIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Systemathics, the trading automation technology specialist, has now integrated its Ganymede product with ICE DataVault. Built as cloud native, Ganymede is a fully managed platform, continuously updated with high-quality, curated, and cross validated data. Ganymede is purpose built for the financial data markets ever increasing data volumes, allowing clients to query against large data sets, including tick-by-tick, sampled, daily, corporate actions, ESG and reference data

title: ICE Mortgage Technology's eClose Solution Saves Lenders 70 Minutes Per Loan
text: PLEASANTON, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ICE Mortgage Technology announced the results of its hybrid eClose ROI study showing 70 minutes saved per loan and 2.3 days faster loan cycles.
